landing.heroTitle: Never forget to take your medication again
landing.heroSubtitle: Smart reminders for you, your family, or those you care for. Organize your medications, supplements, and vitamins in one place.
landing.benefit1Desc: Personalized notifications for each medication. Whether for yourself or someone you care for.
landing.benefit2Desc: Prescriptions, exams, and vaccines organized. Everything ready to show your doctor when needed.
landing.benefit3Desc: Manage your own medications or track the health of parents, children, and dependents.
landing.benefit4Desc: Know when to buy more. Avoid the anxiety of running out of medication.
landing.benefit5Desc: Get answers about your medications in a simple and accessible way.
landing.benefit6Desc: Simplified onboarding. Set up your first reminder in seconds, not hours.
landing.emotionalQuote: Have you ever forgotten to take an important medication today?
landing.emotionalText: Whether you take daily medications yourself or care for someone who does, every dose counts. HoraMed brings peace to your health routine.
landing.howItWorksSubtitle: No complications. If you know how to use a phone, you know how to use HoraMed.
landing.step1Desc: Type the name or photograph the prescription. We organize everything.
landing.step2Desc: At the exact time. Push, alarm, or even WhatsApp.
landing.step3Desc: Know that you or your family member is taken care of.
landing.worksSubtitle: Developed for anyone who needs medication reminders — for themselves or those they love.
landing.pricingTitle: Start free, upgrade when you want
landing.planPremiumDesc: For those who want the best
landing.simpleDesc: Intuitive interface with large buttons and clear text. Whether managing your own medications or caring for someone.
landing.worksOnPhone: Works on the phone you already have
landing.finalCtaTitle: Take better care of your health today
landing.finalCtaDesc: Join thousands of people who already trust HoraMed to never miss a medication again.
landing.newFeature1Desc: Take a photo of your prescription and register medications automatically with smart recognition.
landing.newFeature2Desc: Ask questions about your medications by chatting with Clara, your personal health assistant.
landing.newFeature3Desc: Start using in seconds. No complicated forms, just the essentials.
landing.newFeature4Desc: Navigate the app using voice commands. Say "add medication" or "I need help" and you're done.
landing.newFeature5Desc: Generate complete reports to take to your doctor with your adherence history and medications.
landing.newFeature6Desc: See medication prices at different pharmacies and save when buying.
landing.newFeature7Desc: Earn experience points with each dose taken. Complete weekly challenges and level up.
landing.useCasesSubtitle: Whether for yourself or those you care for, we have the right solution.
landing.useCase1Desc: You take daily medications and want to make sure you never miss a dose.
landing.useCase2Desc: You manage your parents' or grandparents' medications and want to ensure they're taking them.
landing.useCase3Desc: You manage the health of the whole family, including vaccines and children's medications.
landing.useCase4Desc: You have ongoing treatment and need discipline to never miss a dose.
landing.newFeaturesTitle: New features that simplify your life

vaccines.title: Vaccination Card
vaccines.subtitle: Complete vaccine record following the National Calendar
vaccines.howItWorksDesc: Add each vaccine with the application date and batch number. The app organizes everything and reminds you when there are upcoming doses or boosters!
vaccines.infoDesc: Based on the National Vaccination Calendar from the Ministry of Health and the Digital Child Booklet. Keep your vaccine history always updated and organized.
vaccines.addVaccineHint: Add your vaccines manually or scan your vaccination card.

vaccines.deleteDesc: This action cannot be undone. The record will be permanently deleted.

privacy.title: Privacy & Security
privacy.subtitle: Manage your data and privacy
privacy.lgpdDesc: HoraMed is fully compliant with data protection laws. All your data is stored securely and encrypted.
privacy.legalDocumentDesc: For detailed information about Terms of Use, Subscriptions, Cookies and Security, please see the complete legal document.
privacy.manageDataDesc: You have full control over your personal and health data.
privacy.dangerZoneDesc: Irreversible actions that will permanently affect your account.
privacy.deleteConfirmDesc: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your account and remove all your data from our servers.
terms.title: Legal Document
terms.subtitle: Terms, Privacy and GDPR
terms.acceptanceDesc: By installing, accessing or using the HoraMed app, you declare that you have read, understood and fully agree with this Legal Document. If you do not agree with any provision, you should not use HoraMed.
terms.eligibility1: Users aged 18 (eighteen) years or older; or
terms.eligibility2: Minors under 18 under the responsibility of parents or legal guardians
terms.service1: Registration of medications, doses, schedules and routines
terms.service5: Generation of periodic reports for medical appointments
terms.service6: AI features to organize health data
terms.notMedical: HoraMed is not a medical service, does not diagnose, prescribe or alter treatments and does not replace consultation with healthcare professionals.
terms.commitment1: Provide true, complete and updated information
terms.commitment3: Notify immediately if unauthorized access is suspected
terms.forbidden1: Use HoraMed for illegal or discriminatory purposes
terms.forbidden4: Register false data or third-party data without authorization
terms.licenseDesc: HoraMed is provided through a limited, personal, non-exclusive, non-transferable and revocable license for strictly personal and non-commercial purposes.
terms.intellectualPropertyDesc: All rights to the "HoraMed" brand, interface, layout, content and source code belong to Luis Eduardo Paim Longhi. Unauthorized use is prohibited and may result in legal action.
terms.medicalDisclaimer: Medical Notice and Limitation of Liability
terms.informativeDesc: HoraMed is a support tool for organizing health information, and does not replace:
terms.notSubstitute2: Diagnosis, prescription or follow-up by qualified professional
terms.doctorDecision: Any decision about treatments should be made exclusively with your doctor.
terms.aiContentDesc: Explanations and summaries displayed in the app are informative, based on:
terms.liabilityDesc: The Responsible is not liable for medical decisions made based exclusively on HoraMed information. The app is provided "as is
terms.plansDesc: HoraMed offers a free plan (Free) with basic features and Premium plan with additional resources.
terms.billingTerms: Billing, invoicing and refunds follow the respective store terms and consumer protection legislation.
terms.autoRenewDesc: The Premium plan has automatic renewal at the end of each period. Price changes will be notified in advance, allowing cancellation before renewal.
terms.howToCancelDesc: Cancel anytime directly through the store:
terms.uninstallWarning: Uninstalling the app does not cancel the subscription!
terms.trialDesc: Free trial periods may be offered. If you do not cancel before the end, billing will start automatically.
terms.refundsDesc: Refund requests must be made directly to the store (Google Play or App Store), following their specific policies.
terms.dataControllerDesc: Luis Eduardo Paim Longhi, individual responsible for HoraMed.
terms.familyHealthProfilesDesc: Profile name, date of birth, relationship, profile photo
terms.healthDataSensitiveDesc: Medications, doses, schedules, documents (prescriptions, exams, vaccines), stock
terms.noDataSale: We do NOT sell your data to third parties
terms.right1: Confirmation: Know if we process your data
terms.right5: Portability: Export data in readable format
terms.right6: Elimination: Delete data processed with consent
terms.right7: Information: Know with whom we share
terms.retentionDesc: Data kept while account is active or for the time necessary to comply with legal obligations.
terms.securityDesc: We adopt technical and organizational measures to protect data against unauthorized access, misuse, loss or destruction.
terms.noSystemSafe: No system is 100% secure. In case of relevant incident, we will notify authorities and users as required by GDPR.
terms.cookiesDesc: On the landing page and related web interfaces, we use:
terms.essentialCookies: Essential cookies: Necessary for basic operation
terms.analyticCookies: Analytics cookies: To understand usage and improve experience
terms.marketingCookies: Marketing cookies: For campaigns and results measurement
terms.accountTerminationDesc: You can request account termination and data deletion at any time, subject to legal retention obligations.
terms.suspensionDesc: We may suspend or terminate accounts in cases of fraud, abuse or violation of these Terms.
terms.supportContactDesc: Questions about usage, subscriptions or privacy:
terms.documentChangesDesc1: This Document may be updated periodically to reflect legislative changes, app adjustments or clarity improvements.
terms.documentChangesDesc2: Significant changes will be communicated by app notice, email or update date highlight.
terms.documentChangesDesc3: Continued use after changes will be interpreted as agreement with the new conditions.

help.title: Help & Support
help.subtitle: Learn how to use HoraMed
help.step1Desc: Go to "Profile" and add your basic information. You can create multiple profiles to manage medications for family members.
help.step2Desc: Click "Add" in the bottom menu. You can:
help.step3Desc: On the "Routine" page, view all configured medications and schedules. Edit or delete as needed.
help.step4Desc: On the "Today" page, see the day's doses and mark as taken, skipped, or late. This helps track your treatment adherence.
help.faq1A: Tap the "+" button on Home or Routine tab and follow instructions.
help.faq2A: Go to Routine tab, select the medication and tap "Edit".
help.faq12A: Yes! You can track everyone's medications and history. Each person gets their own schedule and reminders, all in the same app.
help.faq13Q: How does the Symptom Tracker and Correlation work?
help.faq13A: You can log your symptoms and severity daily. HoraMed cross-references this with your active medications to identify potential side effects, helping you and your doctor. Note: it is not a medical diagnosis.
help.faq3A: Premium removes ads, unlocks unlimited stock and cloud backups.
help.faq4A: When you mark a dose as taken, stock is automatically reduced.
help.faq5A: Yes, go to Profile > Manage Profiles to add family members.
help.faq6A: Go to Profile > Export Data to generate a PDF or CSV report.
help.faq7A: Yes, most functions work without internet.
help.faq8A: Cancellation is done directly through the app store (Google Play or App Store).
help.faq9A: Yes, we follow strict security and privacy standards (GDPR).
help.stockControlDesc: Never run out of meds again.
help.step5Desc: Track your progress in the History tab.

export.subtitle: Download your personal data

export.sensitiveNote: This file contains sensitive health data. Share only with trusted professionals.

charts.totalDosesDesc: Total number of doses scheduled for the selected period. This includes all medications and configured schedules.
charts.dosesTakenDesc: Number of doses you confirmed as taken in the period. Each dose taken at the right time contributes to treatment success.
charts.adherenceRateDesc: Percentage of doses taken relative to total. Above 80% is considered excellent for maintaining treatment effectiveness!
charts.bestPeriodDesc: Time of day when you have the best dose adherence. Use this information to understand your patterns and optimize medication schedules.
charts.timeAnalysisDesc: Identify your best and worst times for taking medications
charts.premiumFeature: Advanced progress charts and detailed statistics are only available on the Premium Plan.
charts.mostMissedDesc: Medications you missed the most. Pay attention to these items.
charts.noMissed: No missed medications in the period
charts.insightDesc: Tip to improve your treatment adherence.
agenda.title: Health Agenda
agenda.subtitle: Manage all your health appointments intuitively

cofreDoc.deleteDesc: This action cannot be undone. The document will be permanently removed.

cofreDoc.prescriptionUsedHint: Mark if you already bought the medications

healthCalendar.syncErrorDesc: Could not sync with Google Calendar.
weight.trackEvolution: Track your weight evolution over time
weight.weeklyRecommendedDesc: To track trends, we recommend logging your weight once a week. Too frequent logs may confuse the analysis.
weight.frequencyGuidance: To track trends, we recommend logging your weight once a week.
weight.stableWeeks: Your weight has been stable in recent weeks.
weight.variationPeriod: There was a variation of {value} kg compared to the previous period.
weight.insufficientData: Not enough data for trend analysis yet.
weight.treatmentCorrelation: Since starting {medication} ({days} days ago), variation of {value} kg.
weight.trackingHistory: {count} records over {days} days. Total variation: {value} kg.
weight.observationsPlaceholder: E.g.: After breakfast, with light clothes...
weight.weightUpdatedDiff: Weight updated! {diff} kg since last measurement.

notifSetup.title: Set Up Notifications
notifSetup.configureDesc: Set up notifications to receive reminders even when the app is closed
notifSetup.activeDesc: You will receive reminders even when the app is closed
notifSetup.configNeededDesc: Follow the steps below to enable reminders
notifSetup.authorizeApp: Authorize the app to send medication reminders
notifSetup.batteryDesc: Without this, Android may block notifications when the app is closed.
notifSetup.batteryPath: Go to Settings → Apps → HoraMed → Battery → Unrestricted
notifSetup.testDesc: Send a test notification to confirm it is working
notifSetup.iosTip1: Keep Focus Mode disabled or add HoraMed to exceptions
notifSetup.iosTip2: In Settings → Notifications → HoraMed, enable "Time Sensitive Notifications"
notifSetup.iosTip3: Enable Sounds and Alerts to not miss any reminder
notifSetup.webInfo: For notifications when the app is closed, install HoraMed on your phone.
notifSetup.permissionDenied: Permission denied. Enable manually in phone settings.
notifSetup.openSettingsInfo: Open phone settings and follow the steps above
wizardStep.name: Medication Name
wizardStep.typeDesc: Is it a medication, vitamin, or supplement?
wizardStep.durationDesc: Is it continuous or temporary use?
wizardStep.frequencyDesc: How often do you take it?
wizardStep.timesDesc: What times do you take it?
tutorial.title: Tutorial
tutorial.subtitle: Learn how to use all HoraMed features
tutorial.addMedStep1: Tap the + button on the home screen
tutorial.addMedStep2: Choose the item type (medication, vitamin, supplement)
tutorial.addMedStep3: Enter the name or search in the list
tutorial.addMedTip: You can also scan a prescription to automatically add medications.
tutorial.confirmDoseStep1: On the Today screen, find the pending dose
tutorial.confirmDoseStep2: Swipe right to confirm as taken
tutorial.confirmDoseStep4: You can also tap the dose card for more options
tutorial.confirmDoseTip: Confirm doses on time to keep your streak!
tutorial.editScheduleStep2: Find the medication you want to edit
tutorial.editScheduleStep3: Tap the pencil icon to edit
tutorial.editScheduleStep4: Change times, frequency or other data
tutorial.stockStep2: See all medications with active stock
tutorial.stockStep3: Tap "Adjust" to add or remove units
tutorial.stockStep4: The app automatically decreases stock when you confirm doses
tutorial.stockTip: Keep a safety margin to avoid running out.
tutorial.durationStep3: Or select "Temporary" for a set period
tutorial.durationStep5: The medication will be deactivated automatically at the end
tutorial.addDocsStep3: Take a photo or select a file
tutorial.addDocsStep4: The app reads the document with AI
tutorial.shareDocStep1: Open the document you want to share
tutorial.shareDocStep3: A temporary link will be generated
tutorial.shareDocStep4: Send the link to whoever you want
tutorial.shareDocStep6: You can revoke access at any time
tutorial.shareDocTip: Use this to share prescriptions with doctors or pharmacies.
tutorial.enableNotifTip: Battery optimization can block notifications on Android.
tutorial.visitHelp: Visit our help center for more information

medInfo.disclaimer: This information is for educational purposes only and does not replace the guidance of a healthcare professional. Always consult your doctor or pharmacist before starting, changing, or stopping any treatment.

healthHistory.title: Medical History
dailyComplete.completedAll: You completed all doses for today!
monthlyReport.improved: Congrats! You improved {percent}% compared to last month.
monthlyReport.punctual: Great punctuality! Average delay of only {minutes} minutes.
monthlyReport.noSkipped: Perfect! You did not skip any dose this month.
category.vitaminTooltip: Vitamin D, B12, B complex, multivitamins, etc.
category.supplementTooltip: Whey, creatine, omega-3, collagen, probiotics, etc.
category.otherTooltip: Any other item you want to track
category.info: Choose the item type. This helps organize your medications and show relevant information for each category.
notifSettings.title: Notifications
notifSettings.description: Configure when and how to receive reminders
notifSettings.takeDesc: Marks as taken and updates stock
notifSettings.offlineDesc: Your actions are saved automatically and synced when you go back online.
caregiver.shareLink: Share the link with the caregiver
caregiver.viewerInfo: Viewers receive notifications only for exceptions (missed doses, critical stock).
caregiver.helperInfo: Helpers can also mark doses as taken.
tour.welcomeDesc: Let's take a quick tour to get you familiar with the app and start organizing your health simply.
tour.todayDesc: Here you see your daily doses with times. Tap ✓ when you take them, ⏰ to snooze 15min, or → to skip. Simple!
tour.routineDesc: Register medications, vitamins, and supplements. Set the times and you're done! The app reminds you automatically.
tour.progressDesc: See your health commitment, streaks of days without missing doses, and earn badges! Every day counts.
tour.walletDesc: Store prescriptions, exams, and vaccines in one place. Take a photo and the app reads it automatically! Share with doctors when needed.
tour.readyDesc: Start by adding your first medication. Use the + button whenever you need to add something new. Good health!
tutorials.today.title: Your health day 💊
tutorials.today.message: Here you see all doses for the day. Tap the ✓ button to confirm you took it, or hold for more options. Keep your streak going!
tutorials.cofre.title: Health wallet 🏥
tutorials.cofre.message: Store exams, prescriptions, vaccines and consultations. Share with doctors when needed. Everything secure and organized.
tutorials.progress.title: Your progress 📈
tutorials.progress.message: Track your evolution with statistics, streaks and achievements. Every dose taken counts towards your success!
tutorials.stock.title: Stock control 📦
tutorials.stock.message: The system automatically calculates when your medications will run out. Update stock when you buy more and never run out.
tutorials.estoque.title: Smart stock control 📦
tutorials.estoque.message: The app calculates when each medication will run out. Update when you buy more and receive alerts before running out.
tutorials.historico.title: Complete history 📊
tutorials.historico.message: See all doses taken, times and patterns. Ideal for showing your doctor at appointments.

interactions.disclaimerFull: ⚕️ This tool provides general information about potential drug interactions. It is not a substitute for professional medical advice. Always consult your doctor or pharmacist before starting, stopping, or changing any medication.

alarm.ios.title: Important for iOS

landing.newFeature9Desc: Generate a 1-page PDF with your adherence, medications, and symptoms for your doctor.

tutorial.symptomsStep2: Select your symptoms and their severity
tutorial.symptomsStep3: See potential correlations with your active medications
tutorial.symptomsTip: Your symptoms will be saved for your next medical report.

brief.pdfDisclaimer: Note: This document is generated from self-reported patient logs and does not constitute a medical diagnosis.
